articles.title: Users Don’t Need More Tools: They Need Seamless Integrations
articles.summary: A closer look at why users don’t need more tools in their daily lives. What they need are seamless integrations of useful features to match already existing, established mental models. Brought to you by Design Patterns For AI Interfaces, **friendly video course on UX** and design patterns by Vitaly.

articles.title: Every summer, I lose at least a day of creative work to the heat – but not this time
articles.summary: Here's how to survive the next heat wave.

articles.title: Matching AI Modality To User Intent: Designing The Right Interface
articles.summary: We’ve fallen into conversational tunnel vision, defaulting every AI capability into a chat-based interface simply because LLMs are trained on dialogue data. But great UX is about matching modality to users’ context, intent, and cognitive load, so the interface adapts to the user, not the other way around.
